title: ICMR NITVAR Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 05 Consultant and Project Research Scientist I Posts
description: The National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR NITVAR) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 05 Consultant and Project Research Scientist I Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the MBBS, BDS, MD/ MS, M.Sc, Post Graduation, and Diploma can use this opportunity and apply for the ICMR NITVAR Notification 2026 . Here we mentioned more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation...
